notes:
v0.6.2 Hotfix
🐛 Currency exchange rates: Currency definitions now accept positive fractional rates below 1, such as 0.625, for sheet and virtual currencies.
🔔 Visual Novel Maker notifications: Visual Novel Maker is now auto-discovered by the notifier subsystem after its standalone UpdateNotifier was retired.

v0.6.1 Hotfix
🐛 Notification Board update notes: Update notes now render inline HTML formatting correctly, so tags such as <b>, <br>, and <code> no longer appear as raw text.

v0.6.0 Update
✨ Notification Board: GlitchSmith updates and announcements now surface through a single board instead of one popup per module. The board uses tabs for Updates and Announcements, with per-module sub-tabs when more than one entry is available. Skip, disable, and acknowledge actions stay per module.
✨ Library self-notifications: The library now publishes its own update entries through the same board.
✨ Notifier API: Added api.notifier.openBoard() for modules that want to surface the board manually.

v0.5.1 Update
⚡ SWADE decimal currency migration: Existing SWADE worlds whose currency entry was created before decimal support automatically gain decimal precision on next load so that system.details.currency accepts fractional amounts without a manual reset. Runs once per world and skips currencies the GM has already configured.

v0.5.0 Update
✨ Shared sheet currency API: Added getSheetCurrencies, getSheetBalance, setSheetBalance, modifySheetBalance, setSheetBalances, and registerSheetCurrencyDriver under glitchsmith-lib.currency.
✨ Batch sheet currency updates: Added modifySheetBalances for multi-denomination rewards and transactions.
✨ Built-in sheet drivers: Actor data paths, PF2e/SF2e coin inventory APIs, and WFRP4e money items.
✨ Driver registration hook: Added the glitchsmith-lib.registerSheetCurrencyDrivers hook for external systems.

announcement.title: 🔔 GlitchSmith Library v0.6.2
announcement.content:
GlitchSmith Library v0.6.2 is a hotfix update.

  • Currency exchange rates: Currency definitions now accept positive fractional rates below 1, such as 0.625, for sheet and virtual currencies.
  • Visual Novel Maker notifications: Visual Novel Maker is now auto-discovered by the shared notifier after its standalone UpdateNotifier was retired.
